title: Greek Gods
description: Spawn and battle your own Greek Gods mobs
body:
**Ever wanted to spawn and fight the Greek Gods?**

_Perhaps_ you want **Zeus** the most powerful Greek God who can throw _lightning bolts,_ to compete against  the dark side of **Hades**, God of the Underworld, and his _staff_.

How about an army of the Legendary God of the Seas **Poseidon**  using his most _powerful trident_.

Maybe you would host your own Gladiator tournaments with your very own **Hercules** watch them inflict incredible amounts damage just with their own fists.... if you do this mod for you. 


**_Add this to mod it into your Minecraft NOW!_**

Coming soon: Mythical creatures, Mount Olympus biome, pre-built colosseums battleground and an Underworld Dimension complete with Lost Souls!
